title: Lantern's Peace
description: 🔥👻 Prevents mob spawning with soul lanterns & other soul light sources
body:
# Lantern's Peace ![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42f8b1cf4369992304ac0c6d8372b9ec5b040a65.jpeg) Prevent mob spawning around soul light emitting blocks even if hidden underground. ## Features: > **You shall not spawn**: No monster entities will be able to spawn inside a 16x16x16 rectangle around the soul light emitting block (or 8 blocks from each sides). Works even if the soul light source is placed hidden underground. >

###### (in the gif the Soul Lantern is below the yellow concrete block to stops monsters spawning)
